text.message: This game is cooked already lol

can you port for a grain

swear it happens to me everytime that i have the best brick
Yeah but porting brick 4:1 is not the game I want to be playing lol
Can we stop trading blue?  He already has the game in the bag
Dude just play your hand. Stop taking advantage of the others lol
lol what a fd hand can’t do anything
Green you gotta watch out for road here
Oj can have it.  I'm fine building
